rows.label: qev055801_MSG0001
rows.name:
For a powerless Orphean like myself, who
possesses no particular technical skills,
surviving on this planet is exceedingly difficult.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055801_MSG0002
rows.name:
...Therefore, I would like to ask you
a question. Have you ever seen the
Bias controlling various beasts?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055801_JNK0010
rows.name: Affirm[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055801_SEL0011
rows.name: Answer that you have seen it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055801_JNK0020
rows.name: Deny[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055801_SEL0021
rows.name: Answer that you have not seen it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055801_MSG0003
rows.name:
Oh! You are quite knowledgeable! Please,
you must tell me about that time.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055801_MSG0004
rows.name:
Hmm... mm-hm. ...I see. That
matches my research findings.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055801_MSG0005
rows.name: It looks like... this just might work.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055801_MSG0006
rows.name:
...Well, you see, I have
succeeded in copying the incense
they use when taming beasts.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055801_MSG0007
rows.name:
...I see. I haven't actually
seen it myself either, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055801_MSG0008
rows.name:
As a result of numerous investigations...
I have succeeded in copying the incense
they use when taming beasts.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055801_MSG0009
rows.name:
If I can just acquire the abilities of a beast tamer,
even someone like me, who lacks their robust physique,
will have a drastically higher probability of survival.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055801_MSG0010
rows.name:
Um... I intend to conduct a beast
taming experiment shortly... Could
I possibly ask for your assistance?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055801_MSG0011
rows.name:
Thank you very much. If things go poorly,
it is a dangerous experiment that could cost
my life. I felt uneasy doing it alone.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055801_MSG0012
rows.name:
Then let us head to the Shadow Beach at
once. I am going to tame a beast called
a Grand Lophid using this incense.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055801_MSG0013
rows.name:
Look! There happens to be a
Grand Lophid right over there.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055801_MSG0014
rows.name:
I will attempt to tame it now, but...
If the incense does not work, please
rescue me immediately. Understood?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055801_JNK0030
rows.name: Affirm[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055801_SEL0031
rows.name: Assure Min'boiton to leave it to you with confidence.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055801_JNK0040
rows.name: Worry[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055801_SEL0041
rows.name: Express concern that he might be eaten suddenly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055801_MSG0015
rows.name:
With your combat capabilities, a beast
like that would be no match for you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055801_MSG0016
rows.name:
I am truly... envious. You possess
the power to survive on your own
without taking such risks.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055801_MSG0017
rows.name:
It is true that the success rate of this experiment
is not high. However, I will not be able to
survive on this planet alone either way...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055801_MSG0018
rows.name:
I believe this is a reasonable
risk to take in order to survive.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055801_MSG0019
rows.name:
...Well then, I am off. Hehe...
Despite the situation, my Ovah
is inexplicably elated...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055801_MSG0020
rows.name:
When I think about making a beast like
that my servant, I feel a sense of
vindication, a clear, satisfying feeling...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055801_MSG0021
rows.name:
...I will definitely tame it. I
refuse to be underestimated by
a beast like that ever again![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055801_MSG0022
rows.name:
Oh... it's working! Yes, come
closer... slowly, just like that![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055801_MSG0023
rows.name:
You've returned. My information
gathering here has been flawless.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055801_MSG0024
rows.name:
Goodness, I never thought the Bias
and the other aliens would be such
amiable, good-natured people.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055801_JNK0050
rows.name: Affirm[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055801_SEL0051
rows.name: Agree with Min'boiton that there are few bad aliens in NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055801_JNK0060
rows.name: Question[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055801_SEL0061
rows.name: Ask what kind of aliens he became close with.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055801_MSG0025
rows.name:
Present company included... you are all fine
people. I certainly feel a slight disconnect,
but it is a manageable difference.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055801_MSG0026
rows.name:
I had the pleasure of speaking with
Shirya of the Bias, Noborata of the
Ma-non, and Chikochiko of the Nopon.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055801_MSG0027
rows.name:
They seem to always be diligently gathering
information here. They were quite knowledgeable,
and talking to them was very educational.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055801_MSG0028
rows.name:
...Oh, are you the lifesaver
Min'boiton was talking about?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055801_MSG0029
rows.name:
Man, this Orphe sure is reckless.
Even us Bias wouldn't attempt
such dangerous taming.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055801_MSG0030
rows.name:
However, if I can just make the incense
using the method Shirya taught me, I
should be able to tame that beast.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055801_MSG0031
rows.name:
It seems that an Amidresia Tomato,
Jagged Mortars, and Zazen Powder
are required as ingredients.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055801_MSG0032
rows.name:
I am sorry, but could you please procure them
for me? I would like to stay here and learn the
techniques of taming in a little more detail.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055801_MSG0033
rows.name:
The secret arts of the Bias... the more I hear,
the deeper they are. It seems it wasn't something
I could master simply by gathering information.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055801_MSG0034
rows.name:
...However, I am determined to master them. I will
acquire the strength to survive on this planet.
Please, find the ingredients for the incense.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055801_MSG0035
rows.name:
If you are having trouble finding the
ingredients, it might be a good idea
to ask the knowledgeable people here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055801_MSG0036
rows.name: [ST:playername ], my preparations here are complete.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055801_MSG0037
rows.name:
How are things on your end? Did you
obtain the ingredients for the incense?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055801_MSG0038
rows.name:
Thank you very much. Um...
Shirya, is this acceptable?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055801_MSG0039
rows.name:
Yeah, with this thing here, you can
make an underling out of a Belgazas, a
Baldileo, or whatever else you want![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055801_MSG0040
rows.name:
...Then shall we head to the beach
right away? Thank you all for taking
care of me in so many ways.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055801_MSG0041
rows.name:
Just tell us if you have any trouble. The folks
here are just a bunch of good-for-nothings who
slack off every day without working or fighting.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055801_MSG0042
rows.name:
If we don't help out someone
occasionally like this, we'll
incur the wrath of the Great Ones![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055801_MSG0043
rows.name:
It is a mysterious thing... Why do I
feel such warmth from the words of
someone who does not possess an Ovah?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055801_JNK0070
rows.name: Explain[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055801_SEL0071
rows.name: Say that even without an Ovah, people can connect through feelings.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055801_JNK0080
rows.name: Question[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055801_SEL0081
rows.name: Ask if the Ovah is really such a crucial thing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055801_MSG0044
rows.name:
I see... I completely failed to
understand the aliens' sensibilities
in that regard, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055801_MSG0045
rows.name:
Now, I can believe a little bit in the
mysterious concept of a connection that
does not mediate through the Ovah.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055801_MSG0046
rows.name: Yes... it is absolute and the truth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055801_MSG0047
rows.name:
...However, I am also feeling the
possibility... right now... that
other forms of connection exist.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055801_MSG0048
rows.name:
...Well then, [ST:playername ], let us meet up
again at the Shadow Beach.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055801_MSG0049
rows.name:
In order to not let what Shirya taught me
go to waste, I will succeed this time.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055801_MSG0050
rows.name:
...Look, over there. If it's
a Grand Lophid we need, there
is another one right there.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055801_MSG0051
rows.name:
Its guard seems to be down.
Now... is my chance![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055801_JNK0090
rows.name: Cheer[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055801_SEL0091
rows.name: Back up Min'boiton's enthusiasm.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055801_JNK0100
rows.name: Worry[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055801_SEL0101
rows.name: Express concern that he might get eaten after all.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055801_MSG0052
rows.name:
Hearing that from someone
like you gives me courage.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055801_MSG0053
rows.name:
This time, I will make that beast
submit with this incense passed
down directly from Shirya![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055801_MSG0054
rows.name:
You are kind after all. Just like
the aliens who were over there.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055801_MSG0055
rows.name:
...But, it will be fine. This time, I
will make that beast submit with this
incense passed down directly from Shirya![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055801_MSG0056
rows.name:
Match my breathing with the
target... Stare into its eyes,
and capture... the beast's soul![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055801_MSG0057
rows.name:
It is just as Shirya said... This beast
is already as good as my servant.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev055801_MSG0058
rows.name: Now, come closer... slowly.[ST:wait ]
